notes: SHIP v1.14.235 — FORGE DEFECT-2 FIX: MASTER BRIDGE + HONEST ZERO-STATE. ROOT CAUSE (proven, not suspected): the Forge Master bridge read `window.master` — a global that HAS NEVER EXISTED in this app. The live Master is `window._lastPhantomMaster`. So `deploy_forge_rackList()` fell through to `[]` on every open, `RUN` was always empty, boot ran `setLoadout(RUN.slice(0,5))` = `setLoadout([])`, and the aisle rendered five blank pads (`· · ·`), no chips, herotag `—`. CONSEQUENCE: the Forge aisle has NEVER rendered real Master data — for any user, with any Master loaded. Both .233 ('read-only aisle over real Master') and .234 ('verify writeback') shipped a data path that could not execute; the `try/catch -> []` swallowed it, which is exactly the repo's NO-SILENT-FAILURES hard rule, and why two ships passed node --check and went out dead. Confirmed empirically on the live .234 build in Chrome BEFORE touching code (`window.master` = undefined, `window._lastPhantomMaster` = object, rackList = EMPTY_ARRAY). FIX (2 edits, body.rd-only, Forge module inside forge3d_render): (1) NEW `deploy_forge_master()` reads `window._lastPhantomMaster` with a guard mirroring `master_hasMaster()` (non-empty racksByCab required — a restoredFromStorage object can carry cab-level data only); `deploy_forge_rackList()` + `deploy_forge_slots()` both route through it; empty is now a LOUD console.warn, never a silent `[]`; a rack present with `master_rackToElevation` missing now goes to `phantom_logErr` instead of vanishing. (2) NEW `deploy_forge_zeroState()` — an empty aisle must SAY why: no Master -> herotag+hint 'NO MASTER LOADED · LOAD A MASTER FILE TO BUILD YOUR LOADOUT' + toast; Master present but loadout empty -> 'NO RACKS LOADED · TAP ⊞ TO BUILD YOUR LOADOUT' + toast + picker auto-opens; populated -> restores the default hint (#hint is shared DOM that survives close/open, so a prior no-Master open would otherwise strand its message — caught in end-to-end verification, not review). VERIFIED END-TO-END in Chrome against a synthetic 6-rack Master BEFORE push: cold no-Master open -> zero-state message + warn; Master loaded + reopen -> first-5 loadout (c1:001..c4:002), focus c1:001, '0/6 RACKED', 5 chips, live canvas, hint recovered; loadout persists to deploy_forge_loadout_v1 across close/open. NOT A BUG — 'only 3 racks visible': five slots ARE built; FOV 46 + radiusTarget 9.8 focus dolly frames the focused rack plus flanks on portrait (design intent, 'TAP FLANKS TO WALK'). Owner-confirmed no change. rowOf()'s split(':') is also FINE — it matches the app's canonical row convention (mscope/rackmap use the same). D3 RESOLVED: vendored vendor/three.min.js (SW-precached since .218) verified mock-compatible — sRGBEncoding + outputEncoding + ACESFilmicToneMapping + FogExp2 + PCFSoftShadowMap present, NO outputColorSpace -> pre-r152. No shim, no upgrade. D2 IS NOT RESOLVED — .234's ship note OVERCLAIMED. Traced the overlay: phantom_node_status_v1 is written ONLY at :18044 (verify-row toggle) and :18049 (undo), read ONLY at :17726 (hydrate) and :17748 (statusOf inside the memoized deploy_forge_slots). There is NO reconciliation code anywhere. A device marked RACKED then dropped from a re-imported Master SILENTLY VANISHES — no flag, no reconcile list, counts just re-base (12/14 -> 11/13) and the orphan entry rots in localStorage. Two more holes: cross-rack moves lose status (rackId is in the key), and the advertised 'U'+uStart fallback is DEAD CODE (slot.name defaults to '—' so it is never falsy) -> two nameless devices in one rack collide on `rackId|—` and SHARE one status. Owner has RULED the fix (field beats import; ADDED/MOVED/REMOVED diff on Master load; RECONCILE list with CONFIRM REMOVED vs FLAG MASTER ERROR; key on device identity) -> ships as .237, deliberately NOT stacked on this unverified base. Gates: node --check x4 inline blocks + sw.js, CSS untouched, CRLF preserved, three-stamp .234->.235. ?legacy=1 byte-identical (all Forge code is body.rd-only). DEVICE-VERIFY (HARD STOP, John iPhone): (1) open FORGE 3D with NO Master -> honest 'NO MASTER LOADED' herotag+hint+toast, no blank-pad silence; (2) load a real Master, open FORGE 3D -> REAL racks render, real hostnames on the gut trays, chips populated, herotag 'ROW:CAB · FOCUS / LIVE MASTER · N/M RACKED'; (3) ⊞ picker lists EVERY rack in the Master grouped by row; (4) confirm the ~3-visible framing reads right with real racks in frame. See INTEGRATION-STATE.md at repo root.
